member.name: M:Ping(AccountId)
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping

member.name: M:Ping(AccountId,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.

member.name: M:PingAsync(AccountId)
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node asynchronously.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping
member.returns: an empty future that throws exception if there was an error

member.name: M:PingAsync(AccountId,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node asynchronously.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.returns: an empty future that throws exception if there was an error

member.name: M:PingAsync(AccountId,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node asynchronously.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:PingAsync(AccountId,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node asynchronously.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:PingAsync(AccountId,System.Action,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node asynchronously.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:PingAsync(AccountId,System.TimeSpan,System.Action,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Send a ping to the given node asynchronously.
member.param: Account ID of the node to ping
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:PingAll
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.

member.name: M:PingAll(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.
member.param: The timeout after which each execution attempt will be cancelled.

member.name: M:PingAllAsync
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network asynchronously. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.
member.returns: an empty future that throws exception if there was an error

member.name: M:PingAllAsync(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network asynchronously. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.
member.param: The timeout after which each execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.returns: an empty future that throws exception if there was an error

member.name: M:PingAllAsync(System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network asynchronously. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.
member.param: a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:PingAllAsync(System.Action,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network asynchronously. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.
member.param: a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:PingAllAsync(System.TimeSpan,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network asynchronously. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.
member.param: The timeout after which each execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:PingAllAsync(System.TimeSpan,System.Action,System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Sends pings to all nodes in the client's Network asynchronously. Combines well with setMaxAttempts(1) to remove all dead nodes from the Network.
member.param: The timeout after which each execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.
